name: QHSLab, Inc.
business: QHSLab, Inc. is a digital health company that provides a platform for independent primary care practices to identify and manage behavioral health conditions through digital screening and follow-up care. It also offers allergy diagnostics and treatment under the AllergiEnd brand, including FDA-cleared skin test applicators. Revenue is generated primarily from per-patient per-month subscription fees from medical practices and sales of allergy diagnostic kits and immunotherapy treatments.

exposures.sentence: We generate revenue primarily through recurring per-patient, per-month fees paid by participating medical practices for access to and use of our digital platform and associated services.
The AllergiEnd product line consists primarily of FDA-cleared, disposable, single-use allergy skin test applicators and matching test trays designed for office-based use.
AllergiEnd is our allergy diagnostics and treatment offering, designed to enable primary care practices to identify and manage allergic disease within the primary care setting.

tamClaims.claim: approximately 60 million individuals in the United States are affected by allergic disorders
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that approximately 60 million individuals in the United States are affected by allergic disorders.
